metadata.review_trigger: Dependency version, source, license, vulnerability, contract, purpose, or consumer change

lock_status: implemented for working candidate: Linux production, Windows development, and container-build locks are tracked; Python and WireMock images are digest-pinned; refresh after dependency changes

dependencies.name: CPython
dependencies.rollback_exit: Select previous immutable application image; supported reimplementation target is Python 3.11+

dependencies.name: FastAPI
dependencies.purpose: REST routing, validation, dependency injection, OpenAPI
dependencies.rollback_exit: Restore lock and image digest; replacement requires REST contract parity

dependencies.name: HTTPX
dependencies.purpose: Asynchronous member and partner-config HTTP clients
dependencies.rollback_exit: Restore lock/image; alternative client must preserve IFACE-POLICY-001 and failure classes

dependencies.name: Model Context Protocol Python SDK
validation: MCP stdio discovery and invocation smoke

dependencies.name: pydantic-settings
dependencies.purpose: Typed environment configuration and Pydantic models
dependencies.rollback_exit: Restore lock/image; replacement requires schema and settings parity

dependencies.name: structlog
dependencies.rollback_exit: Restore lock/image; standard-library JSON logging is viable replacement

dependencies.name: Uvicorn standard
dependencies.rollback_exit: Restore image digest; alternate ASGI server must keep one active process topology

dependencies.name: SQLite via Python sqlite3
dependencies.contract: Python-bundled SQLite; WAL; BEGIN IMMEDIATE; one shared file
dependencies.rollback_exit: Preserve DB/WAL/SHM; distributed replacement requires migration ADR and new guarantees

dependencies.name: prometheus-client
dependencies.contract: Version to be locked; names/labels frozen by IFACE-OPS-001
dependencies.rollback_exit: Disable METRICS_ENABLED or restore image; alternate exporter preserves names

dependencies.name: WireMock
dependencies.purpose: Controlled member/policy success and failure dependencies
dependencies.contract: current tag wiremock/wiremock:3.6.0; immutable digest required
dependencies.rollback_exit: Restore prior digest; HTTPX mock transport can cover non-container tests

dependencies.name: Docker Engine and Compose
dependencies.purpose: Build and run one API replica with controlled dependencies
dependencies.contract: Compose v2; exact engine version recorded per evidence event
dependencies.rollback_exit: Document native Python fallback for E2 only; E4+ requires container parity

dependencies.name: draw.io CLI/Desktop
dependencies.purpose: Authoritative multi-page topology source and exact renders
dependencies.contract: Exact version and export flags recorded with render
validation: render hash and visual parity review
dependencies.rollback_exit: Keep source plus last exact SVG/PNG; rendering remains outside production image

dependencies.name: OpenAI Image2
dependencies.contract: 2048x1152 derivative from approved exact architecture PNG
dependencies.provenance: OpenAI image generation service; model/tool identity recorded per event
dependencies.rollback_exit: Exact draw.io render remains authoritative and sufficient

dependencies.name: HyperFrames, Node.js, and FFmpeg
dependencies.purpose: Deterministic walkthrough titles/composition and MP4 encoding
dependencies.contract: Versions, source hash, command, and output hash recorded per event
dependencies.license: Verify locked HyperFrames/Node dependencies; FFmpeg build license varies
dependencies.rollback_exit: Primary GitHub-friendly PNG evidence remains available
